evals.prompt: Use emmy-artifact-ingest to ingest ./ATO/new-diagram-notes.pdf into the Emmy knowledge store.
evals.expected_behavior: Classify as local file, plan source record creation, upload attachment, checksum, extraction, and review-queue entries.

evals.prompt: Ingest knowledge from https://example.cms.gov/emmy/runbook into the Emmy knowledge store.
evals.expected_behavior: Classify as URL source, create source record without upload, extract directly, and create needs-review queue entries.

evals.prompt: Ingest this Confluence page outside the Emmy knowledge store: https://confluenceent.cms.gov/spaces/ABC/pages/123456/External+Runbook
evals.expected_behavior: Classify as external Confluence page, read through Confluence MCP, record page metadata, and queue extracted claims.

evals.prompt: Ingest the current deployment knowledge from the local CMSgov/emmy-infra checkout.
evals.expected_behavior: Resolve local checkout, record repo, branch, commit, clean status, path/line provenance, and queue extracted claims without upload.

evals.prompt: Ingest what this feature branch in emmy-api says about callback routing.
evals.expected_behavior: Mark repository-derived claims as branch-scoped unless verified on the canonical branch.

evals.prompt: Ingest this uncommitted iv-cbv-payroll change as knowledge.
evals.expected_behavior: Treat as local-observation only and keep it needs-review, not canonical.

evals.prompt: Search the Emmy knowledge store for the deployment runbook.
evals.expected_behavior: Use the ambient emmy-knowledge-store skill, not the ingest workflow.

evals.prompt: Summarize this local PDF for me, but do not put it in Confluence.
evals.expected_behavior: Do not ingest because the user did not ask to store knowledge.
